failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out while querying the catalog dependency, preventing the agent from retrieving the item price.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the correct goal and used the required ProductCatalogSearch tool with well-formed item_id and product_id arguments. The first failure is the tool result at index 3, which explicitly reports CatalogServiceTimeoutError: the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is an infrastructure/dependency timeout, not a malformed invocation, guardrail block, or reasoning error. The error was not resolved later; the agent only reported that the task could not be completed.
